title: cassandra calyculata var. angustifolia
intro: Cassandra calyculata var. angustifolia, also known as the narrow-leaved Queen's crown, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cassandra calyculata var. angustifolia include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat skin conditions such as acne and eczema. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusing its leaves in hot water or decocting them in a solvent to create teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
